heading: Built-In Objects
body:
| Feature    | Supported |
| ---------- | --------- |
| BigInt     | No        |
| Map        | Yes       |
| Promise    | Yes       |
| Proxy      | No        |
| Reflect    | No        |
| Set        | Yes       |
| Symbol     | Yes       |
| TypedArray | Yes       |
| WeakMap    | Yes       |
| WeakSet    | No        |
